// BAD: benchmark docs referencing debug-build numbers alongside release claims
// README.md:
// "Our parser processes 100MB in 2.3 seconds (measured on debug build with assertions)"
// "Run `cargo bench` to reproduce these numbers"
// Note: benchmarks were run with debug_assertions enabled

fn parse_document(input: &str) -> Document {
    debug_assert!(!input.is_empty());
    debug_assert!(input.len() < MAX_SIZE);

    let mut parser = Parser::new(input);
    parser.parse()
}

#[cfg(test)]
mod benches {
    use super::*;
    use test::Bencher;

    #[bench]
    fn bench_parse_small(b: &mut Bencher) {
        let input = "sample document content";
        b.iter(|| parse_document(input));
    }
}
